We are seeking a Senior IoT Integration Engineer to design, deploy, and maintain wireless data acquisition systems in ATEX-classified hazardous areas. The primary project involves bridging RS485/Modbus field devices to desktop data readers using wireless technology, with intrinsic safety barriers at zone boundaries. This person will assess logger communication capability, integration options, data flow, security, cloud architecture, dashboard requirements, implementation risk, and rollout readiness. The output of this role is not only code, but also a practical and executable technical blueprint for the project. This scope matches the major layers used in industrial IoT solutions: field connectivity, interoperability, device authentication, telemetry ingestion, and dashboard/alerting | Experience | • Minimum 5 years of experience in IoT system integration, industrial automation, or instrumentation engineering | • At least 2 years of hands-on experience with LPWAN technologies (LoRa/LoRaWAN, NB-IoT, or Sigfox) | • Proven experience with RS485/Modbus RTU protocol in industrial environments | • Experience working in or with ATEX/IECEx classified environments (oil & gas, petrochemical, chemical, pharmaceutical, or similar) | Core skills to screen for: | Industrial protocols: MQTT, Modbus RTU/TCP, OPC UA, REST, WebSocket | Networking: TCP/IP, VPN, APN, routing basics, RS485, serial debugging | Cloud/backend: IoT platform design, brokers, ingestion, APIs, time-series storage | Security: TLS, certificates, IAM/RBAC, secrets handling | Architecture: solution design, tradeoff analysis, documentation | Execution: feasibility study, scope definition, risk assessment, budgeting support | Communication: vendor coordination, stakeholder presentation, technical writing | Success criteria for the first 60–90 days | Complete assessment of current logger/device capability. | Deliver recommended end-to-end architecture. | Deliver integration decision: direct, gateway-based, or middleware-based. | Produce risk register and list of technical dependencies. | Produce implementation roadmap, estimated effort, and recommended team structure. | Identify whether firmware, gateway, backend, or dashboard customization is required
